displayTitle: The Clone Wars #09: In Service of the Republic, Part 3
synopsis: Jedi Plo Koon and Kit Fisto have successfully removed one of the obstacles holding back their mission to free the Khormai people. If only they didn't have to deal with a cowardly Captain, who can't seem to keep out of trouble - and the Separatists' assassin, Asajj Ventress, who is on their trail!
title: The Clone Wars #09: In Service of the Republic, Part 3
